channel.title: Mage on The City
channel.description: Recent content in Mage on The City

item.title: The Lonely Halls
item.description:
“I’m not here.”

“I’m NOT here.”

“I’M NOT HERE!”

And he wasn’t. The battle continued, where he had been, but he was gone. Much more gone than usual, which wouldn’t be realized by others until the battle had passed.

It was black, pitch black. Somewhere he heard a slow dripping sound, but it was the black that surrounded him as his mind slowly cleared. The quiet, even with the dripping sound, helped to calm his panicked mind.
